title: alsophila micra
intro: Alsophila micra, also known as the Dwarf Tree Fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand, characterized by its small size and delicate fronds. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Alsophila micra include soothing skin irritations and wound healing, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Alsophila micra typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the plant's fronds, which can be used to make teas, salves, or tinctures.
